notes:
Phase 9 (Default-On Flip) + Cleanup Phase completed.

T-90 (mxdx-awe.43): Created scripts/check-perf-streak.sh (reads last N nightly result files, exits 0 only when all green). Created .github/workflows/e2e-beta-perf.yml (nightly cron at 03:00 UTC + per-PR on P2P paths). Established 3 consecutive green local verification runs.

T-91 (mxdx-awe.44): Flipped P2pConfig.enabled default from false to true. Updated doc comments in config.rs, worker p2p_integration.rs. Fixed pre-existing MatrixHandshakeSigner::new() signature mismatch (1 arg, not 2) in both worker and client. Updated p2p_wiring tests to explicitly set enabled=false in disabled_config(). Created CHANGELOG.md. Verified --no-p2p still forces Matrix fallback.

T-C0 (mxdx-awe.45): Closed all 5 npm-era P2P beads with superseded-by comments: mxdx-8y1 (→T-31+T-80), mxdx-vuy (→T-40/41/42), mxdx-4yf (→T-60+T-62), mxdx-eud (→T-82), mxdx-xi6 (→T-71..T-75+T-84).

T-C1 (mxdx-awe.46): Added 'Implemented in' annotations to all 4 P2P ADRs. Updated MANIFEST.md with mxdx-p2p crate entry. README.md verified current, no TODOs in src/.

T-C2 (mxdx-awe.47): Per T-83a (launcher stays on npm path), shims retained as launcher-internal. Removed @deprecated JSDoc and console.warn from p2p-crypto.js, p2p-signaling.js, p2p-transport.js. Updated MANIFEST.md to show 'launcher-internal' status.

Nurture: Added test-results/, test-worker-log.txt, .sqlhistory to .gitignore. Verified workspace compiles (cargo check --workspace --exclude mxdx-core-wasm). No spec drift detected.

Security (T-SEC, mxdx-awe.49): FINAL GATE PASSED.
- check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh: green
- trybuild Megolm constructor test: passes (mxdx-matrix)
- trybuild SealedKey constructor test: passes (mxdx-p2p)
- No send_raw/skip_encryption/unencrypted in production code
- All send paths require Megolm<Bytes> — plaintext on wire is a type error
